sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The SSML_MC20 class, implemented in Cython, is a specialized event template within the AnalysisG framework, designed to handle data specific to Semi-Supervised Machine Learning (SSML) Monte Carlo 20 (MC20) events. It inherits from the generic EventTemplate class, extending its functionalities to incorporate features and structures relevant for SSML MC20 processing. This class provides a high-performance interface to an underlying C++ event object tailored for SSML-based analyses.

sect1.title: The SSML_MC20 Class
sect1.para: SSML_MC20 is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. It inherits from EventTemplate, thereby gaining all the base functionalities for event indexing, weighting, and tree/branch management. Its primary role is to encapsulate a C++ ssml_mc20 object, which likely contains specific data members and methods pertinent to SSML MC20 events.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes a new C++ ssml_mc20 object and assigns its pointer to self.ev. It then upcasts self.ev to an event_template* and assigns it to self.ptr, allowing SSML_MC20 to be treated as a generic EventTemplate while still managing its specialized C++ object.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer. This method is intentionally left empty, as initialization logic is handled by __cinit__ and the underlying C++ object.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. It deallocates the C++ ssml_mc20 object pointed to by self.ev, ensuring proper memory management for the specialized event data. Note that self.ptr is not directly deleted here, as it points to self.ev.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The SSML_MC20 class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class SSML_MC20: Declares SSML_MC20 as a Cython extension type.
cdef ssml_mc20 *ev: A C++ pointer to an ssml_mc20 object, which is the specialized C++ representation of an SSML MC20 event.
self.ptr = <event_template*>(self.ev): This line demonstrates C++ upcasting, where a pointer to a derived class (ssml_mc20) is assigned to a pointer to its base class (event_template). This allows SSML_MC20 to fulfill the EventTemplate interface while internally managing its specific ssml_mc20 data.
from AnalysisG.core.event_template cimport EventTemplate: Imports the base EventTemplate class, from which SSML_MC20 inherits.
from AnalysisG.events.ssml_mc20.event_ssml_mc20 cimport *: Imports the C++ ssml_mc20 class declaration from its .pxd file.
